http.port.Description: HTTP listen port for ACME/redirect (null = hashed default)

certs.hostnames.Description: Extra hostnames to provision certs for (beyond routes[].host)

certs.selfsigned.caCommonName.Description: CN for the local CA root

certs.selfsigned.caOrganization.Description: O for the local CA root

certs.selfsigned.keySize.Description: RSA key size in bits (2048 or 4096)

certs.letsencrypt.email.Description: Contact email registered with the ACME account

certs.letsencrypt.directoryUrl.Description: Custom ACME directory URL (overrides staging flag)

certs.letsencrypt.renewBeforeDays.Description: Renew when cert is within N days of expiry

certs.letsencrypt.renewCheckIntervalHour.Description: How often to check for renewals (hours)

certs.letsencrypt.bootstrapWithSelfSigne.Description: Serve a self-signed placeholder while ACME first issuance runs

certs.file.default.key.Description: Default key path for file strategy

certs.file.default.cert.Description: Default cert path for file strategy

certs.file.default.ca.Description: Default CA chain path for file strategy

default.target.Description: Fallback backend URL when no route matches
